mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURVEY(snum, mnum, code, fin, sdate, sub) VALUES (survey_seq.NEXTVAL, #{mnum}, #{code}, 'unfinished', SYSDATE, #{sub})

INSERT ALL
INTO SURVEYCONTENT(SUBCODE, surveycnt, surveytitle, surveytype) VALUES (survey_seq.CURRVAL, #{item.surveycnt}, #{item.surveytitle}, #{item.surveytype})
select * from dual
mapper.update: UPDATE SURVEYCONTENT SET surveycnt = surveycnt + 1 WHERE subcode=#{snum} AND surveytype=#{surveytype}
UPDATE SURVEY SET fin = 'finished' WHERE snum = #{snum}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SURVEY_HISTORY WHERE snum = #{snum} AND mnum = #{mnum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURVEY_HISTORY (hnum, snum, mnum, vote_date) VALUES (survey_history_seq.NEXTVAL, #{snum}, #{mnum}, SYSDATE)
